reviews.review_title: Nice, but has room for improvement
reviews.review_description:
I enjoy these mahjong type games and wish it had more layout options rather than just the square, also a proper mahjong option would be nice.
It's easy enough to get started, but once you get stuck there's no way that I can see to continue to the next page, and the "give up" button doesn't do anything. I would expect it to then reshuffle the stones, but it just asks if you're sure that you want to give up and takes you back to the main menu. If you then pick the same board again, the stones hsve the exact same positions that they had when you chose to give up. Currently I'm stuck in such a situation and cannot continue.
There's also some dices on the table that can be thrown, but they don't seem to do anything either?
For the price it's quite polished and nice, but it needs a way to move forward without getting stuck.

reviews.review_title: Needs to be redone for VR
reviews.review_description: The game itself is enjoyable but it is the same game, tile layout as the free app you can get on your phone from the App Store or Google play.  Its appearance in VR is fuzzy and not clear. You’re limited in number of games and you land up remembering the plays when you redo a level. Needs more variety at each level. They could crush this game but  they haven’t put anything new to it so it’s just a money grab
